title: A Dark Legend Takes Shape
description: On pages 7–9, this part follows Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #9, World Government, Rocks D. Xebec, Scopper Gaban as Elbaf’s history turns darker as older conflicts, powerful bloodlines, and the roots of hatred behind the present crisis come into focus.
scene: Elbaf’s history turns darker as older conflicts, powerful bloodlines, and the roots of hatred behind the present crisis come into focus.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: No, focus! This is our chance, Kuma!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And I've secured the baby. That's good enough, right?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm forever in your debt! Now, please get back here before darling finds out!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm sorry! I may not be able to help your brother...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But I swear to at least save you...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You all really thought you could get away in the chaos?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Pirate or towns- folk... none of you will escape on my watch!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Rocks Pirates are coming in from the Southeast!!

dialogue.speaker: Scopper Gaban
dialogue.text: The Roger Pirates from the Northwest!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Fight to the last!! We haven't gotten the treasure to safety yet!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The rocks crew are coming from the other side!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I'm going to save her first!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Shaky! We're here to save you!

summary: This part advances Elbaf’s Violent Past through 36 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
